commands.review_summary:
The PR reorders reply-dispatch TTS/media handling and adds regression tests so media-bearing TTS tool results can bypass message_tool_only suppression while sendPolicy deny still blocks delivery.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +113. Total +117 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: in the merge result, a text-only TTS tool result is passed through resolveToolDeliveryPayload before TTS can add media, so it returns before the new exemption runs. I did not execute tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor revision and live proof: the merge result still filters the text-only TTS result before TTS/media processing, and the PR body lacks live Discord/Telegram delivery evidence.
